text:
Saturday, 21 March 2026, 14:47

21 March 2026

The 20-year-old resident of Cherkasy scored a 15.500, Ukrinform reports.

This is the second Olympics for Kovtun. At the 2020 Olympic Games in Tokyo, the Ukrainian took 11th place in the men's individual all-around event and was seventh in the team competition.

Photo:Getty Images

title: Ukrainian gymnast Kovtun wins silver at Paris Olympics
description: Ukrainian gymnast Illia Kovtun has claimed a silver medal in the men's parallel bars event at the Paris 2024 Olympics. — Ukrinform.
